prompts.title: The Executive Radiance Video Prompt
prompts.prompt: Create a polished 9:16 vertical (Instagram Reels) advertisement video for Luma Skin promoting Radiant Ritual Collection. Product context: A premium skincare and makeup line centered on radiant skin, confidence, and elevated daily beauty rituals. Target audience: Beauty-conscious consumers seeking premium daily skincare and makeup rituals. Marketing objectives: Increase brand desirability, drive collection sales, and improve social engagement. Tone: Sophisticated, serene, and authoritative. Music mood: Upbeat electronic with building energy, subtle bass drops at transitions. Typography: Modern sans-serif (Inter/Poppins), bold headlines, light body text. Color palette: #6366f1, #8b5cf6, #06b6d4, #f59e0b, #1e293b. Keep branding clear, mobile-friendly, and visually consistent. Storyboard plan: Scene 1 (6s): Close-up of Clara's face under cold, flickering office fluorescent lights. She looks tired but poised. A warm, golden light suddenly sweeps across her face, smoothing the shadows.. Narration: The boardroom lights are harsh. Your glow shouldn't be.. Camera: Slow zoom into her eyes, transitioning from cool-toned lighting to a warm, studio-grade glow.. Visual prompt cues: Cinematic 9:16 shot of a 35-year-old corporate woman in a minimalist high-end office, harsh overhead lighting transitioning into a soft, ethereal golden hour glow on her skin, soft neutral background, luxury aesthetic.. Scene 2 (12s): A rapid but graceful montage of the Radiant Ritual Collection on a white marble vanity with gold accents. Clara applies the serum-infused foundation and a touch of highlighter with precision.. Narration: Introducing Luma Skin. A high-performance ritual designed for the woman who has no time for a ten-step routine, but demands perfection.. Camera: Macro shots of the product texture—swirling cream with gold flecks. Quick cuts following the movement of her hands.. Visual prompt cues: Extreme close-up of a premium skincare bottle with gold accents on marble, liquid silk texture being pumped, soft focus, high-end photography, warm lighting.. Scene 3 (12s): Clara stands at the head of a glass conference table, leading a presentation. She looks vibrant and rested. The light from the window catches the high points of her face.. Narration: Weightless luminosity that stands up to 14-hour days. No caking, no fading—just professional confidence.. Camera: Tracking shot moving slowly around the table, focusing on her radiant profile while she speaks.. Visual prompt cues: Professional woman in a beige tailored suit standing in a sunlit modern boardroom, radiant skin, looking confident, soft neutral color palette, luxury office design.. Scene 4 (10s): Transition to evening. Clara is in the back of a luxury car, checking her reflection in a compact. Her skin still looks as fresh as it did in the morning.. Narration: From the final meeting to the opening gala. Your skin stays as polished as your reputation.. Camera: Medium shot from inside the car looking at her reflection in a gold-framed compact mirror.. Visual prompt cues: Interior of a luxury sedan at dusk, city lights blurring in the background, a woman looking into a gold makeup compact, skin looking dewy and luminous, 9:16 vertical.. Scene 5 (10s): Clara walking into a sophisticated evening event, greeted by peers. She exudes an effortless, 'lit-from-within' radiance.. Narration: Because for you, radiance isn't just a look. It's your armor.. Camera: Low angle, slow-motion walking shot as she enters a room with warm, ambient lighting.. Visual prompt cues: Elegant woman entering a luxury lounge, soft gold lighting, dressed in high-end evening wear, radiant complexion, cinematic atmosphere, 9:16.. Scene 6 (8s): The full Radiant Ritual Collection arranged elegantly. The Luma Skin logo fades in at the center in gold foil lettering.. Narration: Luma Skin. Shop the Radiant Ritual Collection.. Camera: Top-down flat lay shot with a slow pull-away to reveal the full product line.. Visual prompt cues: Product photography flat lay of a skincare and makeup collection, gold and cream packaging, soft neutral background, professional lighting, luxury brand aesthetic.. End with this CTA: Shop Radiant Ritual. Keep pacing smooth, transitions intentional, characters consistent across scenes, and text readable. Follow these brand guidelines: Polished, luxurious, emotionally resonant, soft neutrals and gold accents. Avoid these claims: Guaranteed skin transformation. Do not mention these competitors: Rare Beauty, Charlotte Tilbury, Fenty Beauty.

A warm, golden light suddenly sweeps across her face, smoothing the shadows. | Camera: Slow zoom into her eyes, transitioning from cool-toned lighting to a warm, studio-grade glow. | On-screen text: Command the Light

prompts.title: The Ritual of Light Video Prompt
prompts.prompt: Create a polished 9:16 vertical (Instagram Reels) advertisement video for Luma Skin promoting Radiant Ritual Collection. Product context: A premium skincare and makeup line centered on radiant skin, confidence, and elevated daily beauty rituals. Target audience: Beauty-conscious consumers seeking premium daily skincare and makeup rituals. Marketing objectives: Increase brand desirability, drive collection sales, and improve social engagement. Tone: Serene, Luxurious, and Mindful. Music mood: Upbeat electronic with building energy, subtle bass drops at transitions. Typography: Modern sans-serif (Inter/Poppins), bold headlines, light body text. Color palette: #6366f1, #8b5cf6, #06b6d4, #f59e0b, #1e293b. Keep branding clear, mobile-friendly, and visually consistent. Storyboard plan: Scene 1 (8s): A close-up of Elena’s face, partially illuminated by the blue light of a smartphone in a dimly lit, modern apartment. She sighs softly, puts the phone down, and looks toward a window where the first rays of golden morning light are breaking through.. Narration: In a world of digital noise, find your light. Reclaim your morning.. Camera: Slow zoom-in on Elena’s eyes as the lighting shifts from cool blue to warm golden hour.. Visual prompt cues: Cinematic 9:16 shot of a 30-year-old woman with minimalist aesthetic in a sun-drenched high-end apartment, soft morning light hitting her face, soft neutral color palette, hyper-realistic, 8k.. Scene 2 (12s): Extreme macro shots of the Radiant Ritual Collection. A gold-capped glass bottle being unscrewed; a drop of shimmering, translucent serum falling in slow motion; a silk-textured cream being swiped across a piece of white linen.. Narration: Experience skincare as a sensory ritual. Feel the weight of the glass, the silk of the cream, the warmth of the glow.. Camera: Macro lens, shallow depth of field. Fast cuts synchronized with a soft, rhythmic heartbeat sound effect.. Visual prompt cues: Extreme close-up of a premium skincare bottle with gold accents and a glass dropper, a single drop of glowing liquid, soft focus background, luxury aesthetic, beige and gold tones.. Scene 3 (15s): Elena is at her vanity, which is adorned with a simple ceramic vase and gold jewelry. She applies the Luma Skin serum with slow, meditative upward strokes. She closes her eyes, inhaling the subtle scent, fully present in the moment.. Narration: More than a routine, it’s a moment of mindfulness. A skin-first approach for a finish that doesn't need a filter.. Camera: Medium shot, side profile. The camera moves in a slow, circular motion around her as she applies the product.. Visual prompt cues: A beautiful woman performing a skincare ritual at a minimalist vanity, wearing a silk robe, soft sunlight, golden hour glow, serene expression, high-end photography style.. Scene 4 (10s): Elena is now dressed in a cream cashmere sweater, standing by a window. Her skin looks luminous and dewy—not oily, but healthy. She looks at her reflection in a hand-held gold mirror and smiles with quiet confidence.. Narration: Elevated beauty for the conscious creative. Your light, amplified.. Camera: Close-up of Elena's face, catching the light as she turns slightly. Soft focus on the background to emphasize her skin texture.. Visual prompt cues: Portrait of a woman with glowing, radiant skin, no-makeup makeup look, wearing a cream sweater, standing in a sunlit room, aesthetic and polished, 9:16 vertical.. Scene 5 (10s): The full Radiant Ritual Collection is displayed on a marble surface, surrounded by soft shadows and a single stalk of dried pampas grass. The Luma Skin logo appears in gold leaf font.. Narration: The Radiant Ritual Collection. Elevate your daily routine into a masterpiece.. Camera: Top-down flat lay shot transitioning into a low-angle hero shot of the products.. Visual prompt cues: Luxury skincare collection display, glass bottles with gold caps, marble and linen textures, soft shadows, premium branding, gold accents, elegant composition.. End with this CTA: Elevate Your Routine. Keep pacing smooth, transitions intentional, characters consistent across scenes, and text readable. Follow these brand guidelines: Polished, luxurious, emotionally resonant, soft neutrals and gold accents. Avoid these claims: Guaranteed skin transformation. Do not mention these competitors: Rare Beauty, Charlotte Tilbury, Fenty Beauty.

She sighs softly, puts the phone down, and looks toward a window where the first rays of golden morning light are breaking through. | Camera: Slow zoom-in on Elena’s eyes as the lighting shifts from cool blue to warm golden hour. | On-screen text: Escape the noise.

The camera moves in a slow, circular motion around her as she applies the product. | On-screen text: Filter-free confidence.

She looks at her reflection in a hand-held gold mirror and smiles with quiet confidence. | Camera: Close-up of Elena's face, catching the light as she turns slightly. Soft focus on the background to emphasize her skin texture. | On-screen text: Radiance from within.
